high_concern_flags.detail: HDFA contribution wage cap is given as $184,500 per the federal Social Security wage base for 2026 (the statutory anchor in 19 Del. C. Ch. 37). The 2026 SSA wage base was finalised at $184,500. If a late administrative revision changes this figure, the per-employee max annual contribution ($1,476.00 combined; $738.00 employee-side max) adjusts proportionally. The figure on the page is the live operative value for 2026 payroll runs.

Delaware Paid Leave private-plan grandfathering window dates and approval count: the initial opt-out window ran 1 September 2024 to 1 December 2024 per DE DOL Grandfathering FAQ; approximately 120 employer plans were approved during that window. Continuing private-plan approval remains available outside that window. The five-year grandfathered period ends 31 December 2029 per the statute.
